|desc={{p|Emboar}} is the evolved form of Nate's first partner Pokémon, {{p|Tepig}}. It was seen on Nate's side when he prepared to challenge Elesa.

Emboar's only known move is {{m|Flamethrower}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Nate
|pkmn=Lucario
|type1=Fighting
|type2=Steel
|img=Nate Lucario Aura Sphere Animated Trailer.png
|epnum=Pokémon Black Version 2 and Pokémon White Version 2 Animated Trailer
|epname=Pokémon Black Version 2 and Pokémon White Version 2 Animated Trailer
|desc={{p|Lucario}} is Nate's second known Pokémon. It was first seen with Nate when he was talking with Colress, and later chasing a member of the Shadow Triad across the frozen Opelucid City alongside its Trainer.

Lucario's only known move is {{m|Aura Sphere}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Nate
|pkmn=Arcanine
|type1=Fire
|img=Nate Arcanine Animated Trailer.png
|epnum=Pokémon Black Version 2 and Pokémon White Version 2 Animated Trailer
|epname=Pokémon Black Version 2 and Pokémon White Version 2 Animated Trailer
|desc={{p|Arcanine}} is Nate's third known Pokémon. It was seen alongside its Trainer aboard the Plasma Frigate, taking on a {{tc|Team Plasma Grunt}}'s {{p|Seviper}} alongside Hugh's {{p|Samurott}}.

Arcanine's only known move is {{m|Bite}}.}}
